1.description: MCas a function ofγandσ(1)in the Markov switching model. The remaining parameters are in TableIand originate from Johannes, Lochstoer, and Mou (2016). [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

2.description: A contour map ofΛvalues in the long-run risk model. The figure displays the values of Λ near the parameterization from Schorfheide, Song, and Yaron (2018) as we vary the values of the preference parameters. The remaining parameters are fixed at their values from TableII. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

3.description: The impact of truncation onΛin the long-run risk model. The truncation value is the number of standard deviations at which the normal shocks in29and30are truncated. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]
